## UrlHandler class

This component manage the browser URL parameters to perserve them through reloads and browser history navigation. It allow to configure the default url parameter names using its attributes. This component doesn't render elements to the DOM.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class UrlHandler extends Vue 
```
<b>Extends:</b> Vue

## Properties

|  Property | Modifiers | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  [initialExtraParams](./x-components.urlhandler.initialextraparams.md) |  | Dictionary&lt;unknown&gt; |  |

## Methods

|  Method | Modifiers | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  [created()](./x-components.urlhandler.created.md) |  | To emit the Url events just when the URL is load, and before the components mounted events and state changes, we do it in the created of this component. |
|  [updateUrlWithPush(newUrlParams)](./x-components.urlhandler.updateurlwithpush.md) |  | Updates the browser URL with the new [UrlParams](./x-components.urlparams.md) using the history <code>pushState</code> method. |
|  [updateUrlWithReplace(newUrlParams)](./x-components.urlhandler.updateurlwithreplace.md) |  | Updates the browser URL with the new [UrlParams](./x-components.urlparams.md) using the history <code>replaceState</code> method. |
